checks.name: eventHashChain

checks.name: chronologyAndToolPairing
checks.evidence: Captured timestamps are monotonic. All 22 tool_execution_start events have exactly one later tool_execution_end with the same call ID and tool name; no unmatched result exists.

Raw home-directory paths remain only in the immutable operational trace and are not copied into repository artifacts.

checks.name: promptToolModelProvenance
checks.evidence: Workflow bdd-java, agent spec-driven, prompt bdd-java-spec-driven-v4, agent definition SHA-256 f7265db508f2dfa459e80005f045252e80ef8047a8614fb6802597ec375ca1d0, tool-registry fingerprint 58f9fb4ff63c4ac748fcf030b843b8687a38b4aab2362dd8974d2b5b32f7776b, and model openai-codex/gpt-5.6-sol are present and consistent between metadata, initial trace metadata, and final handoff.

checks.name: gitProvenance
checks.evidence: Initial and sealed final HEAD are 638a4d7c4db3b6c1cbf1457a2b2fbc3e62f5ecd2 and tree 45cf472b6b6f530de98476900afb890d2cce18a0, with empty porcelain-v2 status. The implementation trace changed no files and contains no patch.

checks.name: buildEnvironmentFailureClaim
checks.evidence: The upstream javaspec repository was at launcher commit 33fb70ab0b2758e09af0692fbd193def4f1614be, containing discovery fix 5b65099ade375311b5c00873c557e268196ffce2. The launcher derives repo_root from its script directory and reads repo_root/pom.xml. The sealed project wrapper SHA-256 21cefb68809e918c155fdc05779d72730830d941d37472e998712913820a35bf mounted only that script at /usr/local/bin/javaspec, so execution failed with awk unable to open /usr/local/pom.xml and exit code 2 before baseline. The installed 1.0.0-RC1 JAR SHA-256 2bffe7667dcc217c5a8c8e82815a7ccaa3d97fa53d3b0c847e64361f22bd0ad2 existed and contained formalParameterCount but could not be selected through the broken wrapper layout.

checks.name: trainingAdmission
checks.evidence: Baseline, RED, edits, GREEN, and behavior verification never occurred. This trace is admitted only as a non-training BUILD_ENVIRONMENT_FAILURE incident; numbered episode 0035 is not created.
